texto: There were two choices in life. Survive or succumb. And most people weren’t even conscious of the path they chose. Because they chose for all the wrong reasons. Love, principles, dreams, desire. The world hadn’t changed. It had always been survival of the fittest.
explicacao: Citação de Claire Merle sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There were two choices in life. Survive or succumb. And most people weren’t even conscious of the…” articula motivacao, vida, survival em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e survival.

frase_original: There were two choices in life. Survive or succumb. And most people weren’t even conscious of the path they chose. Because they chose for all the wrong reasons. Love, principles, dreams, desire. The world hadn’t changed. It had always been survival of the fittest.
